text.title: Accessibility Automation QA Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example showing the methodology applied end-to-end, with a trace through the rules and the final spec artefact.

section.title: Trace
section.p: Team adopts axe-core + Lighthouse against four critical journeys at WCAG 2.1-AA. CI blocks merge on any new blocking violation; ticket-severity goes to Jira.

section.title: Final artefact

list.item: r2: branch tied to axe-core rule id.
